prompt: Featured event banner for an AI meetup in Christchurch New Zealand. Theme: AI Governance and AI Literacy. Dark green solarpunk aesthetic, Avatar the Last Airbender cel-shading style. Bold outlines, vibrant saturated colours. Imagery: a glowing neural network or circuit pattern woven through native New Zealand fern fronds, with abstract figures gathered around a shared light source — representing a community learning together. Text-free design. Wide landscape format for website banner use. Mood: thoughtful, hopeful, grounded, slightly futuristic but warm. Colour palette: deep forest green background, bright green accents, soft gold highlights.
